channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: How the GENIUS Act repriced bitcoin's monetary premium
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Ravi Tanuku on why the GENIUS Act didn't just regulate stablecoins, it repriced Bitcoin's monetary premium. Then, Jesper Johansen on why looped ETH staking no longer needs a lending market.

item.title: BIS project finds tokenization could make cross-border payments faster, safer
item.description: Project Agorá, backed by major central banks, will now move toward "real-value" testing to settle tokenized central bank money and bank deposits on blockchain rails.

item.title: Kraken Now Lets You Earn Yield on Bitcoin Holdings via Lending Vaults
item.description: Kraken customers can make use of their Bitcoin holdings and generate BTC yield without ever leaving the exchange.

item.title: Crypto IPOs could create massive $1 trillion market amid tokenization wave, Jefferies says
item.description: The Wall Street investment bank expects a wave of crypto and blockchain public listings over the next two years as institutional investors shift their focus from speculative trading to real-world financial infrastructure.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Huawei's New Benchmark Gives AI Agents Months of Your Life—Then Watches Them Fail
item.description: Claw-Anything simulates a real digital existence and asks AI assistants to handle it. GPT-5.5, the best model available, scored 34.5%.

item.title: StakeDAO exploit creates 5.4 trillion vsdCRV but nets only $91K
item.description: PeckShield said the attacker bridged 43.7 ETH to Ethereum after minting trillions of vsdCRV, while EmberCN said most of the remaining tokens had insufficient liquidity to sell.

item.title: Mastercard Secures New York BitLicense in Push for Stablecoins, Tokenized Deposits
item.description: Mastercard has secured a highly coveted BitLicense in New York, anchoring its compliance-first strategy for stablecoins on Wall Street.

item.title: HTX denies UK sanctions allegations as new data flags $7.6B Russia-linked flows
item.description: UK sanctions Huobi Global S.A., operator of HTX, over alleged role in Russia’s “A7” shadow network, as new analysis claims the exchange handled billions in high‑risk flows.

item.title: Banca Sella gets MiCA clearance for crypto services in Italy
item.description: The bank plans to launch digital asset custody, transfer and receipt services in 2026 for selected customer categories.

item.title: Block kicks off Cash App’s phased stablecoin roll out to its nearly 60 million users
item.description: An individual familiar with the matter told CoinDesk the stablecoin feature was rolled out to 25% of users already and by the end of the week, all users will have access.

item.title: Bitcoin price shrugs off $1.3B BlackRock ETF block sale
item.description: Bitcoin’s price stayed firm despite a massive $1.3 billion block sale executed by a mysterious BlackRock ETF holder, which analysts called a sign of large-scale institutional de-risking.

item.title: A bipartisan bridge to the future: Why the Senate must finish the job on digital Assets
item.description: The Clarity Act’s recent markup proved that the momentum for regulation is there. It is imperative that Congress move the bill forward to establish rules this generation needs and a framework the next will inherit, urges Kim.

item.title: Citrea | Mainnet Live 🍊🍋 (@citrea_xyz) / Posts / X - x.com
item.description: Citrea | Mainnet Live 🍊🍋 (@citrea_xyz) / Posts / X x.com…

item.title: Sold in May and went away? Bitcoin risks another 10% drop as month turns red
item.description: Bitcoin is on track to end May in the red, a historically bearish signal that could point to deeper losses ahead if the post-May track record is any guide.

item.title: Robinhood is letting AI trade for you so you don't have to keep checking the markets
item.description: Robinhood is bringing hedge fund-style automation to everyday investors by letting AI agents build portfolios, execute stock trades, and even go shopping using virtual credit cards.

item.title: Aeternum brings the second edition of Unchained Summit to Vietnam on May 28-29
item.description: Aeternum, organisers of the Unchained Summit series, will host the second edition of Unchained Summit Vietnam this week on May 28 and 29 at the Furama Resort in Da Nang.

item.title: DTCC plans to bring tokenized assets to Stellar in latest Wall Street blockchain push
item.description: The U.S. market infrastructure giant targets connecting tokenized stocks, ETFs and Treasuries to Stellar in the first half of 2027.

item.title: Crypto’s biggest exchanges back push for token disclosure standards as industry courts institutional capital
item.description: More than 40 crypto firms, including rival exchanges Coinbase and Kraken, are backing a Blockworks-led framework aimed at bringing stock market-style disclosures to token markets.

item.title: Banca Sella gets green light to provide crypto services to customers in Italian first
item.description: The fintech-forward private bank said it is the first Italian lender to get Bank of Italy approval under MiCA to offer digital asset custody and transfers.

item.title: Robinhood Opens Platform to AI Agents for Stock Trading and Credit Card Spending
item.description: Retail brokerage Robinhood now lets users delegate stock purchases and credit card transactions to third-party AI systems.

item.title: Major crypto exchanges increase transfer scrutiny with HTX over UK sanctions
item.description: The UK sanctioned crypto exchange HTX due to alleged ties to Russian sanctions evasion networks and illicit financial activity.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Internet Computer (ICP) Jumps 9.8%
item.description: Stellar (XLM), up 1.7%, joined Internet Computer (ICP) as a top performer.

item.title: Mastercard secures New York BitLicense to support stablecoin and digital payment infrastructure
item.description: The payments giant said the approval supports its push into stablecoins and blockchain-based settlement infrastructure.

item.title: Solana Meme Coin Surges 6,000% After Creators Arrested Over 'Rug Pull'
item.description: The charges against the CatFi creators mark the first time South Korean prosecutors have applied the new Virtual Asset User Protection Act.

item.title: Solana DEX Orca launches new marketplace for tokenized real-world assets
item.description: The launch comes as crypto companies increasingly focus on tokenizing traditional financial assets, a market many in the industry see as a major growth opportunity.

item.title: China’s top court to study rules for crypto and AI cases
item.description: China’s Supreme People’s Court plans to study adjudication rules for crypto and AI cases while the country’s crypto ban remains in force.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin remains under pressure as Korea's SK Hynix joins Micron in $1 trillion club
item.description: Memory chip stocks are attracting capital and attention as crypto markets settle into apathy.

item.title: Crypto-backed candidates win key Texas primary runoffs
item.description: Crypto PACs threw serious money behind a handful of Texas runoffs, helping oust a senior Democrat and boost Republican hopefuls as lawmakers hammer out new US crypto rules.

item.title: Three key XRP metrics suggest ‘explosive price expansion’ is next
item.description: Falling MVRV ratio, high XRP Ledger activity and a bullish wedge pattern signal a potential XRP price rise toward $3.10.

item.title: Morning Minute: Dark Pool Trader Dumps $1.3B in IBIT in Single Clip
item.description: Strategy is paying down its debt instead of buying Bitcoin, and AI tokens are now massively outperforming BTC.

item.title: Bitcoin gauge tracking selling pressure moves into 'high-risk' zone as ETF demand slumps
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs have accumulated a net 4,500 BTC since the start of 2026, with May reversing the buying pattern that built through March and April, per Swissblock data.

item.title: Trump Backs CFTC Over Prediction Markets, Calls State Officials ‘Scum’
item.description: Federal oversight gains the president’s backing as states push to bring prediction markets under their own gambling laws.

item.title: Kraken unveils Bitcoin Vault, expanding yield push for BTC holders
item.description: The new earn product lets users generate BTC-denominated rewards through DeFi strategies while keeping exposure to bitcoin’s price.

item.title: The New Compliance Floor: Organizations are Adopting Stronger Than Ever Monitoring Practices
item.description: This blog is a preview of our forthcoming report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of… The post The New Compliance Floor: Organizations are Adopting Stronger Than Ever Monitoring Practices appeared first on …

item.title: Singapore charges former Hodlnaut CEO Zhu Juntao over Terra collapse claims
item.description: Zhu allegedly directed staff to publish false claims that Hodlnaut had no direct exposure to the TerraUSD collapse on Telegram and in customer emails.

item.title: ETHConf brings Ethereum’s leaders, institutions, and policymakers to New York City on June 8–10
item.description: ETHConf, produced by ETHGlobal, will bring more than 5,000 attendees, 150+ speakers, and 100+ companies to the Javits Center in New York City from June 8-10, 2026 for three days focused on the future of Ethereum and institutional finance.

item.title: Crypto participants once again prefer dollars over bitcoin. USDT, USDC dominance rises.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 27, 2026

item.title: Spot HYPE ETFs absorb 1% of market cap in first 10 trading days: Kairos
item.description: Spot HYPE ETFs absorbed 1.04% of Hyperliquid’s market cap in 10 trading days, beating Bitcoin and Ether ETF debuts.

item.title: $1.3B Worth of BlackRock's IBIT Changes Hands in Dark Pool Sale
item.description: A $1.3 billion off-exchange IBIT block sale shook Bitcoin Tuesday, but experts say the real test is yet to come.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes sharp rebound after BTC collapses below M2 supply 'fair value'
item.description: Bitcoin remained trapped "massively below" its "fair" level, as dictated by global liquidity trends and gold ratio, the latest BTC price analysis says.

item.title: SoFi brings bank-issued stablecoin to 15 million users in crypto push
item.description: The fintech platform says its dollar-backed stablecoin will let members trade, transfer and eventually earn yield through its banking app.

item.title: Bitcoin clings to $75,000 support as bear market signals resurface
item.description: Bitcoin hovered below Tom Lee's $76,000 bull-market threshold while hyperliquid and monero bucked broader crypto weakness.

item.title: South Korea charges CATFI memecoin operators in first DEX rug-pull case: Report
item.description: South Korean prosecutors reportedly charged a group over the CATFI memecoin rug pull, marking the country’s first DEX rug-pull case under crypto law.

item.title: We’re incredibly proud to see @heyibinance recognized in @FortuneMagazine’s Most Powerful Women in Business list. 👏 Yi’s vision and leadership have helped shape Binance, and her inclusion marks the first time a crypto-native executive has been named - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1lR0g2bmdna1l3ZTNSUzNYOURkZGM2cFBzRFNiREdEazJGYi1FVVRSbk82d2draENxakNDMnpYUUNRNm0zS2o3eWxWOHZuSjR4SlB2YUhoU05xSDVT?oc=5" target="_blank">We’re incredibly proud to see @heyibinance…

item.title: Ethereum bull David Hoffman explains why he sold his ETH
item.description: “Ethereum got the ETH price it deserves, and I don’t see ETH being rerated as an asset, higher or lower,” says David Hoffman.

item.title: Sharplink, Forward Industries among crypto firms considered for Russell indexes
item.description: Bitmine and Galaxy Digital may also be eligible for the Russell 1000, an index tracking the largest 1,000 US companies that includes Nvidia, Microsoft and Apple.

item.title: Bitcoin’s recent drop coincides with $1.3B ‘dark pool’ ETF sale: Analyst
item.description: Galaxy Digital’s Alex Thorn says a $1.3 billion sale of BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF was the largest he has seen on a dark pool, or private trading platform.

item.title: Base launches new tool to connect crypto wallets to AI agents
item.description: AI models will be able to transfer funds, swap tokens, check balances and review transaction history with a new tool from Base.

item.title: Tom Lee predicts supercycle amid Bitmine’s largest Ethereum buy in 2026
item.description: Bitmine purchased 111,942 Ether last week, its biggest buy so far in 2026, after the token dropped below $2,200.

item.title: Trump backs CFTC authority over prediction markets
item.description: US President Donald Trump says it is “critically important” that the CFTC has sole authority over prediction markets, and took aim at several state officials.

item.title: U.K. Sanctions 18 Entities and Persons for Evading Russian Trade Blockades
item.description: Summary The U.K.’s Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) sanctioned 18 cryptocurrency exchanges, payment providers, and individuals for helping Russia… The post U.K. Sanctions 18 Entities and Persons for Evading Russian Trade…

item.title: Some Non-Enhanced Athletes Beat Their Juiced Rivals at the 'Steroid Olympics'
item.description: The inaugural games produced a record-breaking swim, but several non-enhanced athletes still beat the enhanced competitors.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump says the USA is currently the Bitcoin capital of the world and other countries "are trying diligently to replace us in that capacity, but we won't let that happen." 👀 "It is a major industry, and we must protect it." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE56T3ktbGFDa1dlaHBTWTlLelE4X3ZBeXBDTVpSd0p2REdNNmxLWXkyeFdqeGFwYXZSdWYwOTVNLVNXSWNmWk03YmNxblVKNmZBYUIzVlBkRWl2d2J1UndPa0liVnRsTk0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Tru…

item.title: Someone Just Destroyed $8.2 Million in Bitcoin—Why?
item.description: Five unknown addresses removed 107 Bitcoin worth $8.2 million from circulation today, sparking intrigue on social media.

item.title: This Half-Gigabyte AI Model Runs Local Agents on Your Phone
item.description: OpenBMB's 1B-parameter model brings MCP support and agentic tool use to on-device AI—but it has trouble with logic traps.

item.title: Ethereum Firm Sharplink, Solana Treasury Forward Industries Joining Russell 2000, 3000 Indexes
item.description: Crypto treasury firms Sharplink and Forward Industries will both be included in the Russell 2000 and 3000 indexes at the end of June.

item.title: If you missed the news last week, I sold my ETH.For someone who built a career, community, identity, and business around Ethereum, this choice does not come lightly.The decision to sell deserves a more thorough explanation than the scattered tweets on Twi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1pSVhYZV80Q2dSZDFwZHN1NUpIZUdyTjVGbHJJQjVrNjdMNjNtdkJIYVB1T09mQzVHdHp1ZDRRMEpHYWlPUmhKME8weE9KQXZzWDdvOWgzV0JmOWxULUwyOGxUaXRoUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">If you missed the news last …

item.title: Grand Theft Data: Threat Actors Weaponizing GTA 6 Hype, NordVPN Warns
item.description: Cybercriminals are weaponizing the hype surrounding Grand Theft Auto 6, flooding the internet with GTA phishing traps and malware.

item.title: Spain Blocks Prediction Markets Kalshi, Polymarket for Potential Gambling Law Violations
item.description: Spain is the latest country to clamp down on the rising use of prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi.
